title: Verify Full Cancellation Flow: User rejects all offers and cancels the trial
description: Tests the complete cancellation path where the user rejects the reminder nudge and the discount offer, successfully canceling their trial.
preconditions: User is in the 'Trial Corner' cohort.
The discount offer is enabled in the backend.

steps.description: 1. Navigate to the 'Trial Corner' hub and click 'Cancel Trial'.
2. On the 'Loss Aversion' pop-up, click 'Cancel Anyway & Lose Access'.
3. On the 'Incentive' offer pop-up, click the secondary action to cancel anyway.
5. Submit feedback or close the pop-up.
6. Verify the 'Trial Corner' hub and homepage widget update to the 'Cancelled' state.

expected_result: The user's trial is immediately cancelled, access to premium content is revoked, and the UI reflects the 'Cancelled' state. The 'feedback-popup-viewed' event is triggered.
